name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a tiger and two children standing in front of a door. The main character was children, children are playing with kite in house. The mood was happy.

The story begins:
 "One day when I came to school the teacher asked me what my favourite animal is. My answer that it isn't known for its power nor beauty," said this little boy who just happened at class 1 on his first turn here after getting out of kindergarten without any schooling as well (from those 2 years). But he still wants to become one himself by looking into art books from middle grade onwards."

 - Soham Adnanu
